metal_acid.description_ru: Active metal + dilute acid: metal + acid = salt + hydrogen
metal_acid.conditions: Metal must be above hydrogen in the activity series; acid must be dilute (not HNO₃)

carbonate_acid.description_ru: Carbonate + acid = salt + water + carbon dioxide

metal_displacement.description_ru: Displacement of a less active metal from a salt solution by a more active metal
metal_displacement.conditions: More active metal (not alkali/alkaline earth) + solution of a less active metal salt

basic_oxide_water.description_ru: Basic oxide of alkali or alkaline-earth metal + water = alkali
basic_oxide_water.conditions: Oxide must be soluble (Na₂O, K₂O, CaO, BaO)

acidic_oxide_water.conditions: Oxide must not be SiO₂ (does not react with water)

salt_precipitate_exchange.description_ru: Exchange between two soluble salts to form an insoluble salt (precipitate)
salt_precipitate_exchange.conditions: Both starting substances must be soluble; one product must be an insoluble precipitate

insoluble_base_decomposition.description_ru: Decomposition of an insoluble base on heating: insoluble base = metal oxide + water
